title: Coerce Boolean to Object
cap_description: Wrap a boolean value in a record
documentation:
## Purpose

Wraps a boolean value in a record (object) so it can be passed to caps that expect a structured record input. The boolean is stored under a standard key in the output record.

## Inputs

A boolean value (media type `media:bool;textable`).

## Outputs

A record containing the boolean value.

## Notes

- Use when a downstream cap requires a record type but the upstream produces a scalar boolean.
- This is primarily a type adapter for the capfab planner.
